title: German companies launch serial production of Gereon unmanned ground...
title_en: German companies launch serial production of Gereon unmanned ground...
title_uk: Німецькі компанії запускають серійне виробництво безпілотних наземних літаків Gereon...
description: German companies launch serial production of Gereon unmanned ground systems for deliveries to Ukraine "In order to supply Gereon to Ukraine, we are ramping up production at our plant in Ulm. Thus, the strategic partnership with ARX Robotics makes a significant contribution to strengthening European defense policy by supporting Ukraine," said the general director of the DEUTZ defense division Gerre.
description_en: German companies launch serial production of Gereon unmanned ground systems for deliveries to Ukraine "In order to supply Gereon to Ukraine, we are ramping up production at our plant in Ulm. Thus, the strategic partnership with ARX Robotics makes a significant contribution to strengthening European defense policy by supporting Ukraine," said the general director of the DEUTZ defense division Gerre.
description_uk: Немецкие компании запускают серийное производство беспилотных наземных систем Gereon для поставок Украине "Чтобы поставить Gereon Украине, мы наращиваем производство на нашем заводе в Ульме. Таким образом, стратегическое партнерство с ARX Robotics вносит весомый вклад в укрепление европейской оборонной политики путем поддержки Украины", - заявил гендиректор оборонного подразделения DEUTZ Герре.

description: French billionaire Xavier Niel, owner of Ukraine’s Lifecell, becomes Vodafone’s largest shareholder. Xavier Niel, the French billionaire and owner of Ukraine’s third-largest telecom operator, has become the largest shareholder of the Vodafone Group after buying a 16.2% stake in the company, Niel’s investment vehicle Vega announced on July 10.

description_uk: рф может выпустить около 1400 «Искандеров» до того, как Украина изготовит первый перехватчик Patriot, — эксперт По словам военного аналитика Юлиана Репке, запуск производства ракет-перехватчиков Patriot в Украине — вопрос не месяцев, а как минимум нескольких лет. После заявления Трампа еще предстоят длительные переговоры, согласование контрактов и вопросы передачи технологий. Репке отмечает, что...

title: Attack attack
description: Polishinel's secret is revealed: in Russia, for the first time, it was recognized that the shortage of gasoline is the result of attacks on refineries. Russian Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak said that the lack of fuel is due to the fact that oil refineries are out of order after the attacks. In the past, Russians were convinced that traffickers and speculators were to blame. And in general, everything is "under control." But it seems that the version about "themselves to blame" is no longer valid.
description_en: Polishinel's secret is revealed: in Russia, for the first time, it was recognized that the shortage of gasoline is the result of attacks on refineries. Russian Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak said that the lack of fuel is due to the fact that oil refineries are out of order after the attacks. In the past, Russians were convinced that traffickers and speculators were to blame. And in general, everything is "under control." But it seems that the version about "themselves to blame" is no longer valid.
description_uk: Секрет Полишинеля раскрыт: в россии впервые признали, что дефицит бензина — результат ударов по НПЗ Вице-премьер рф Александр Новак заявил, что нехватка топлива связана с тем, что нефтеперерабатывающие заводы выходят из строя после прилетов. Раньше россиян убеждали, что виноваты перекупщики и спекулянты. И вообще все «под контролем». Но, похоже, версия про «сами виноваты» уже не проходит.

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: FREYA. This is our Ukrainian anti-ballistics. This project is an anti-ballistic system, which should be an analogue of the Patriot in terms of hitting ballistic targets, but a more mass-produced and cheaper system. This is a European model. Our first meeting in this direction will be in France, and it will be in the near future. Our task was to gather leaders, companies, national security advisers and present...
description_en: FREYA. This is our Ukrainian anti-ballistics. This project is an anti-ballistic system, which should be an analogue of the Patriot in terms of hitting ballistic targets, but a more mass-produced and cheaper system. This is a European model. Our first meeting in this direction will be in France, and it will be in the near future. Our task was to gather leaders, companies, national security advisers and present...
description_uk: FREYA. Це наша українська антибалістика. Цей проєкт – це антибалістична система, яка повинна бути аналогом Patriot щодо збиття балістичних цілей, але більш масового виробництва і більш дешевою системою. Це європейська модель. Перша наша зустріч у цьому напрямку буде у Франції, і це буде найближчим часом. Нашим завданням було зібрати лідерів, компанії, радників з питань нацбезпеки і представити...

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Zelensky reveals details about massive explosions in Kyiv suburb, promises dismissals at Ukraine's largest defense company. The ammunition warehouse that detonated in Vyshneve during Russia's mass attack on Kyiv July 6 belonged to state-owned weapons giant Ukroboronprom, Zelensky said.
description_en: Zelensky reveals details about massive explosions in Kyiv suburb, promises dismissals at Ukraine's largest defense company. The ammunition warehouse that detonated in Vyshneve during Russia's mass attack on Kyiv July 6 belonged to state-owned weapons giant Ukroboronprom, Zelensky said.

title: 000 missiles intercepted
description: In June, the Ukrainian Air Defense Forces shot down only 40% of ballistic missiles, but about 90% of drones and cruise missiles, - the Ministry of Defense The Ministry of Defense reported that Russia fired almost 6,000 missiles over Ukraine in a month. drones and missiles. Air defense forces destroyed almost 5.3 thousand goals Shaheds, Gerbers, Italmas and cruise missiles were the best shot down - about 90%. It is more difficult with ballistics: out of 114 missiles, only 45 were intercepted. For them...

Силы ПВО уничтожили почти 5,3 тыс. целей. Лучше всего сбивали "Шахеды", "Герберы", "Италмасы" и крылатые ракеты - около 90%. С баллистикой сложнее: из 114 ракет удалось перехватить только 45. title: Drone incoming
description: During the meeting with Prime Minister Ulf Kristersson, they discussed the strengthening of Ukrainian combat aviation and the training of our pilots. They also talked about the work on the preparation of the Drone Deal, the protection of our skies and the need for anti-ballistics. Russia continues to attack our cities and communities, massively...

Цього року маємо важливі домовленості зі Швецією у цьому напрямі, і це значно допоможе зміцнити нашу безпеку. Говорили і про роботу над підготовкою Drone Deal, захист нашого неба та потреби в антибалістиці. Росія продовжує атакувати наші міста і громади, масовано...
